title: SSRS report with a real filter contract parameter + output menu item (advanced vs. L4-ssrs-report-basic's empty contract)
instruction: In the sandbox model, use generate_object(mode="scaffold", objectType="report", name="DemoNoteReportAdv", caption="@TaxTransactionInquiry:HeaderNote", fieldsHint="NoteId, Subject", contractParams=[{name:"subjectFilter", type:"str", label:"@TaxTransactionInquiry:HeaderNote"}], generateController=true) to scaffold a 6-object SSRS report: a TempDB tmp table, a DataContract with a real subjectFilter parameter, a Data Provider, a Controller (with an auto-generated prePromptModifyContract() hook), an output menu item, and the AxReport. The scaffold correctly wires contract.parmSubjectFilter() into the DP's processReport() but leaves the actual query as a TODO stub -- replace it with real filtering logic: insert_recordset into the tmp table, selecting NoteId/Subject from a local ConDemoNoteHeader variable where Subject like subjectFilter (default subjectFilter to '*' when blank). All 6 objects must build clean.
